name: uppa-base
description: A lightweight, hook-driven parent theme for agency-built WordPress sites.

scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js
scripts.build:css: sass assets/css/src/main.scss assets/css/dist/main.css --style=expanded && sass assets/css/src/main.scss assets/css/dist/main.min.css --style=compressed
scripts.lint: npm run lint:php && npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css
